title: Punjab & Haryana High Court tells district court judges not to use AI tools to write judgments or do legal research
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court has barred judges in Punjab, Haryana and Chandigarh from using Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools like ChatGPT, Gemini and others to write judgments or conduct legal research. The High Court communicated the decision today to the District & Sessions Judges in the two State and the Union Territory."Hon'ble the Chief Justice has been pleased to ask you to direct the Judicial Officers working
